dataset: Awwwards Site of the Day 2023 Top 200
methodology: Collected entries from the official Awwwards Site of the Day archive in reverse chronological order until the requested number of entries for the target year was reached. Categories, style tags, and tech tags are normalized from Awwwards tag metadata.
